nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel, saying, ‘He who offers the sacrifice of his peace offerings to the Lord shall bring his offering to the Lord from the sacrifice of his peace offerings.

esv.text: “Speak to the people of Israel, saying, Whoever offers the sacrifice of his peace offerings to the Lord shall bring his offering to the Lord from the sacrifice of his peace offerings.

cnv.text: “你要告訴以色列人：向耶和華獻平安祭的，必須從他的平安祭中取出奉給耶和華的供物。

ccb.text: “你把以下条例告诉以色列人。 “凡向耶和华献平安祭的，都要从平安祭中取出一份献给耶和华作礼物。
